id - Variable in class com.rays.common.BaseForm

isEmptyString(String) - Method in class com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl
Checks if a string is null or empty.
isNotNull(Object) - Method in class com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl
Checks if an object is not null.
isSuccess() - Method in class com.rays.common.ORSResponse
Checks if the response indicates success.
isTokenExpired(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Checks if the token has expired.
isZeroNumber(Double) - Method in class com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl
Checks if a Double value is null or zero.
isZeroNumber(Integer) - Method in class com.rays.common.impl.BaseDAOImpl
Checks if an Integer value is null or zero.

Checks if a Long value is null or zero.
